creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Apparently the recent GNOME updates were insufficiently tested with poudriere bulk -tC before commit... this is a poudriere bulk log excerpt.

For the bad symlink, using ${RLN} may help (see porter's handbook 6.1.1) but note you need to adjust the first argument.


[00:04:09] ====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
